abstract.text: Face blend shape data from ARKit, representing facial expression weights.

inlineContent.text: This type is transport-agnostic and can be populated from any source that provides
ARKit-compatible blend shape data (USB-C, Wi-Fi, NFC, recorded files).
All weights are in the range [0, 1] where 0 is neutral and 1 is fully expressed.
